label: Session Status
description: Lifecycle state of a SESSION instance (CASE-389). Two states only — the CONTINUES_FROM edge captures the supersession relationship between sessions; a third 'superseded' state would duplicate that information.

terms.label: Active
terms.description: Session is currently in progress. Set on /setup or /wake.

terms.label: Closed
terms.description: Session has ended. Set by /report session-end (manual close) or /wake's auto-close step (CASE-389 §A).
